python.name: ruff:mcpgateway
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping ruff' && exit 0; echo "Running ruff on: $FILES"; uv run ruff check $FILES

python.name: ruff:plugins
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^plugins/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping ruff' && exit 0; echo "Running ruff on: $FILES"; uv run ruff check $FILES

python.name: black:check
python.description: Black formatter check on changed .py files (mcpgateway/ plugins/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(mcpgateway|plugins)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping black' && exit 0; echo "Running black on: $FILES"; uv run black --check $FILES

python.name: isort:check
python.description: Import order check on changed .py files (mcpgateway/ plugins/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(mcpgateway|plugins)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping isort' && exit 0; echo "Running isort on: $FILES"; uv run isort --check --profile=black $FILES

python.name: bandit
python.description: Bandit security scan on changed .py files (mcpgateway/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping bandit' && exit 0; echo "Running bandit on: $FILES"; uv run bandit $FILES -lll --confidence-level high

python.name: flake8:mcpgateway
python.description: Flake8 PEP-8 / logic errors on changed .py files (mcpgateway/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping flake8' && exit 0; echo "Running flake8 on: $FILES"; uv run flake8 $FILES -v

python.name: flake8:plugins
python.description: Flake8 PEP-8 / logic errors on changed .py files (plugins/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^plugins/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping flake8' && exit 0; echo "Running flake8 on: $FILES"; uv run flake8 $FILES -v

python.name: pylint:mcpgateway
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed mcpgateway Python files — skipping pylint' && exit 0; echo "Running pylint on: $FILES"; uv run pylint $FILES --rcfile=.pylintrc.mcpgateway --fail-on E --fail-under=10

python.name: pylint:plugins
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^plugins/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed plugins Python files — skipping pylint' && exit 0; echo "Running pylint on: $FILES"; uv run pylint $FILES --rcfile=.pylintrc.plugins --fail-on E --fail-under=10

python.name: radon:mcpgateway
cmd: uv run radon cc mcpgateway --min C --show-complexity && uv run radon mi mcpgateway --min B

python.name: radon:plugins
cmd: uv run radon cc plugins --min C --show-complexity && uv run radon mi plugins --min B

python.name: diff-cover
python.description: 95% coverage on changed lines vs origin/main (advisory)
cmd: N=$(( $(nproc) - 4 )); [ $N -lt 1 ] && N=1; uv run pytest -n $N --ignore=tests/fuzz --ignore=tests/e2e/test_entra_id_integration.py --cov=mcpgateway --cov-branch --cov-report=xml -q && uv run diff-cover coverage.xml --compare-branch=origin/main --fail-under=95

python.name: pytest:doctests
cmd: N=$(( $(nproc) - 4 )); [ $N -lt 1 ] && N=1; uv run pytest -n $N --doctest-modules mcpgateway/ --cov=mcpgateway --cov-fail-under=30 --tb=short -q

rust.name: cargo:fmt-check
rust.description: Rust formatting check on changed .rs files (all Rust projects)
cmd:
FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.rs$'); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Rust files — skipping cargo fmt' && exit 0;
_FAIL=0
while IFS= read -r dir; do
  echo "==> fmt: $dir"
  (cd "$dir" && cargo fmt -- --check) || _FAIL=1
done < <(find . -name 'Cargo.toml' ! -path '*/target/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' \
  | while IFS= read -r f; do
      dir=$(dirname "$f")
      grep -q '^\[workspace\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$dir" && continue
      find "$(dirname "$dir")" -maxdepth 1 -name 'Cargo.toml' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "$dir"
    done | sort -u)
exit $_FAIL

rust.name: cargo:clippy
rust.description: Rust Clippy lint on changed .rs files (all Rust projects)
cmd:
FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.rs$'); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Rust files — skipping cargo clippy' && exit 0;
_VENV=$(mktemp -d)
uv venv "$_VENV" --python python3
_FAIL=0
while IFS= read -r dir; do
  echo "==> clippy: $dir"
  (cd "$dir" && PYO3_PYTHON="$_VENV/bin/python" cargo clippy -- -D warnings) || _FAIL=1
done < <(find . -name 'Cargo.toml' ! -path '*/target/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' \
  | while IFS= read -r f; do
      dir=$(dirname "$f")
      grep -q '^\[workspace\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$dir" && continue
      find "$(dirname "$dir")" -maxdepth 1 -name 'Cargo.toml' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "$dir"
    done | sort -u)
rm -rf "$_VENV"
exit $_FAIL

rust.name: cargo:test
cmd:
_VENV=$(mktemp -d)
uv venv "$_VENV" --python python3
_FAIL=0
while IFS= read -r dir; do
  echo "==> test: $dir"
  (cd "$dir" && PYO3_PYTHON="$_VENV/bin/python" cargo test) || _FAIL=1
done < <(find . -name 'Cargo.toml' ! -path '*/target/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' \
  | while IFS= read -r f; do
      dir=$(dirname "$f")
      grep -q '^\[workspace\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$dir" && continue
      find "$(dirname "$dir")" -maxdepth 1 -name 'Cargo.toml' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "$dir"
    done | sort -u)
rm -rf "$_VENV"
exit $_FAIL

rust.name: cargo:audit
rust.description: Rust security audit (all Rust projects, advisory)
cmd:
_FAIL=0
while IFS= read -r dir; do
  echo "==> audit: $dir"
  (cd "$dir" && cargo audit) || _FAIL=1
done < <(find . -name 'Cargo.toml' ! -path '*/target/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' \
  | while IFS= read -r f; do
      dir=$(dirname "$f")
      grep -q '^\[workspace\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$dir" && continue
      find "$(dirname "$dir")" -maxdepth 1 -name 'Cargo.toml' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "$dir"
    done | sort -u)
exit $_FAIL

ui.name: htmlhint
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/templates/.*\.html$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed HTML files — skipping htmlhint' && exit 0; echo "Running htmlhint on: $FILES"; npx htmlhint $FILES

ui.name: stylelint
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/static/.*\.css$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed CSS files — skipping stylelint' && exit 0; echo "Running stylelint on: $FILES"; npx stylelint $FILES

ui.name: eslint
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/static/.*\.js$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed JS files — skipping eslint' && exit 0; echo "Running eslint on: $FILES"; npx eslint $FILES

ui.name: jshint
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/static/.*\.js$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed JS files — skipping jshint' && exit 0; echo "Running jshint on: $FILES"; npx jshint --config .jshintrc $FILES

ui.name: retire
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; npx --yes retire --path mcpgateway/static

ui.name: jscpd
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; npx --yes jscpd mcpgateway/static/ mcpgateway/templates/

integration.name: alembic:upgrade
integration.description: Database migration upgrade validation (SQLite + PostgreSQL, docker-managed)

integration.name: playwright:smoke
integration.description: Playwright UI smoke tests (starts gateway via make serve on :8080, kills after)
cmd: cp .env.example .env 2>/dev/null || true; make serve > /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.log 2>&1 & _PID=$!; echo '==> Waiting for gateway on localhost:8080...'; for i in $(seq 1 120); do curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; kill -0 $_PID 2>/dev/null || { echo 'Gateway exited during startup'; cat /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.log; exit 1; }; sleep 1; done; curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/health >/dev/null; make test-ui-ci-smoke; _EC=$?; kill $_PID 2>/dev/null || true; exit $_EC

integration.name: maturin:build
cmd: _VENV=$(mktemp -d) && uv venv "$_VENV" --python python3 && (cd plugins_rust && PYO3_PYTHON="$_VENV/bin/python" maturin build --release --out dist); _EC=$?; rm -rf "$_VENV"; exit $_EC

integration.name: rust:test-python
integration.description: Python integration tests for Rust extension (plugins_rust/)
cmd: cd plugins_rust && make dev && uv run make test-python

integration.name: rust:test-differential
cmd: cd plugins_rust && uv run make test-differential

integration.name: tools-rust:licenses
cmd: cd tools_rust/wrapper && cargo install cargo-deny --quiet && make licenses
